jobId.description: Daemon job id backing the run.

state.description: Control-plane run state: queued/running while live, then an honest success, block, failure, interruption, cost, exhaustion, non-convergence, or cancellation terminal.

error.description: Error message, when the run failed.

phase.description: Pipeline phase where the failure happened.

category.description: Typed failure category (validation, project, auth, harness, budget, policy, cancelled, internal, unknown).

harnessId.description: Harness involved in the failure, when known.

attemptId.description: Attempt involved in the failure, when known.

rawDetailRef.description: Artifact path holding the raw (redacted) failure detail.

logRefs.description: Log artifact paths relevant to the failure.

eventRefs.description: Event references relevant to the failure.

anyOf.description: Typed failure record for a run: phase, category, evidence references, and suggested next actions.

failure.description: Typed failure record; null unless the run failed.

kind.description: Whether the run was anchored to a project.

context.description: Project context depth used for the run.

project.description: Project metadata projected onto a run summary.

mode.description: Canonical run mode: ask, plan, and audit are read-only; agent writes; orchestrate is the autonomous coordinator intent. Engine strategies (race, attempts, swarm, create) are flags on a mode, not modes.

strategy.description: Engine strategy flag on the mode (race width / attempt caps / until-clean / swarm / create); flags, not modes.

prompt.description: The user's prompt for the run.

routingGoal.description: Routing objective: pace expiring quota, choose the highest declared quality tier, or minimize incremental paid spend.

model.description: Scalar model requested for the run.

harness.description: Explicit reviewer harness id; repeated harness ids are allowed so one provider can review through multiple requested models.

model.description: Per-reviewer model hint, passed to that harness only.

effort.description: Per-reviewer effort hint, passed to that harness only.

items.description: One reviewer of an explicit reviewer panel.

reviewerPanel.description: Explicit reviewer panel used for the run.

path.description: Glob approved by the operator/user for this run; consumed only by the auto-protected gate/test path policy, not by built-in critical-path gates.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the approval.

items.description: Per-run typed operator approval allowing changes under an auto-protected gate/test path.

n.description: Race width, when the run was a race.

paidBudget.description: Explicit incremental-cash budget for the run.

spendUsd.description: Settled spend in USD; null when unknown.

spendEstimated.description: True when spend is token-derived rather than natively reported.

inputTokens.description: Input tokens summed across all attempts; null when no harness reported them.

outputTokens.description: Output tokens summed across all attempts; null when no harness reported them.

cachedInputTokens.description: Cached input tokens summed across all attempts; null when no harness reported them.

outputConformance.description: Structured-output conformance receipt (passed/failed); null when the run had no outputSchema.

requested.description: Preferred auth route: subscription (native/OAuth session), api_key (a stored API key), or auto (engine picks subscription-first with policy fallback). A preference, not a secret.

anyOf.description: Auth mode a route runs under: a native local session, an API key, or unknown.

effective.description: Auth mode a route runs under: a native local session, an API key, or unknown.

anyOf.description: Concrete credential source used or probed by a harness.

source.description: Concrete credential source used or probed by a harness.

reason.description: Deterministic reason for the effective auth route: as_requested, native_first (auto, INV-061), no_native_session_fallback (auto downgraded to api_key), requested_route_unavailable (explicit preference contradicted), or undisclosed.

modelMismatch.description: Requested-vs-observed model mismatch; null when none.

authRoute.description: Auth route receipt (requested/effective/source/reason + disclosing attempt), projected verbatim from telemetry; null when unavailable.

access.description: Access profile of the run: the effective profile when known, else the requested one (prefer requestedAccess/effectiveAccess).

effectiveAccess.description: Access profile actually enforced by the engine.

externalContextPolicy.description: Requested web policy for the run.

webRequired.description: Whether the run required web evidence.

webMode.description: Web policy actually executed by the selected route.

required.description: Whether the run required web evidence.

mode.description: Requested external-context policy for the run.

effectiveMode.description: Policy the selected route actually executed (disclosed upgrades, e.g. cached to live).

attempted.description: Whether any web activity was attempted.

satisfied.description: Whether the web-evidence requirement was satisfied.

tool.description: Web tool that produced the evidence, when any.

target.description: Redacted target (query/url) of the web activity, when any.

errorSummary.description: Redacted error detail when web activity failed.

rawDetailRef.description: Artifact path holding the raw (redacted) evidence detail.

available.description: False when the run predates the telemetry artifact; surfaces must render "telemetry unavailable".

webEvidence.description: Web evidence projected onto a run summary from the telemetry artifact.

items.description: Preflight resolution of one requested capability on one selected harness lane.

requestRequirements.description: Engine-computed requested/effective capability receipts for selected harness lanes.

toolPermissionPolicy.description: Tool allow/deny policy applied to the run.

outputReadyState.description: Whether a terminal run also has a loaded user-facing output artifact: pending (not yet), finalizing (being produced), ready (loaded), diagnostic (only diagnostic output).

toolWarningsTotal.description: Non-blocking tool warnings projected from the telemetry artifact.

kind.description: What the turn actually produced: a patch, an answer, a plan (no files changed), a report, or nothing.

diffStat.description: Diff statistics; null unless a patch exists.

blockers.description: Count of accepted blocking review findings.

adopted.description: True when the live in-place tree was mutated this turn (regardless of review); null when unknown.

applyState.description: Honest application state of a run's changes: not_applied (no in-place mutation), applied (applied and review clean), applied_review_blocked (applied but review blocked/unconverged), or reverted.

preTurnSha.description: Tree SHA before this turn mutated the in-place tree (revert restore target).

postTurnSha.description: Tree SHA right after this turn's mutation; revert refuses if the working tree has diverged from this since.

revertable.description: Revert metadata is available so a Revert affordance may be offered; not a live-safe guarantee — the server re-checks tree divergence at revert time.

result.description: Honest terminal outcome of a run (what the turn actually did), projected from the work product and answer artifacts.

waitingOnUser.description: True while at least one interactive question is awaiting the user's answer.

observedModel.description: Model the harness stream actually reported.

harnessId.description: Harness that ran the final attempt.

verified.description: True only when an observed model was actually reported by the harness stream — never inferred from the request.

anyOf.description: Run-level route evidence projected from telemetry (requested vs observed model).

route.description: Route evidence from telemetry; null when no telemetry exists (legacy runs).

program.description: Executable invoked directly without an implicit shell.

args.description: Exact argv passed to the executable.

cwd.description: Optional project-relative working directory for the command.

envAllowlist.description: Non-secret parent environment names explicitly forwarded to the command.

items.description: Canonical deterministic command invocation; no implicit shell parsing.

specId.description: SpecPack id the run was held to.

specHash.description: Content hash of the SpecPack the run was held to.

summary.description: Run summary row served by GET /runs and embedded in run detail: state, routing, budget, policies, and honest outcome.

lastSeq.description: Highest event seq included in this snapshot; clients subscribe to the event stream from this cursor (snapshot-then-subscribe, no gaps, no dupes).

path.description: Artifact path relative to the run directory.

kind.description: Whether the artifact is a file or a directory.

bytes.description: Size in bytes; absent for directories.

mime.description: MIME type derived from the extension; absent for directories.

items.description: One artifact in the run's artifact tree.

artifacts.description: Artifacts recorded in the run tree.

kind.description: What kind of output this is: answer, report, plan, summary, patch, diagnostic, or structured_output (schema-conformant final/output.json).

bytes.description: Size of the output in bytes.

anyOf.description: The run's primary user-facing output artifact.

primaryOutput.description: The run's primary user-facing output; null while pending.

target.description: Redacted tool target for tool events.

errorSummary.description: Redacted error detail for error events.

rawRef.description: Reference to the raw underlying event/artifact.

items.description: One projected timeline row of a run for display.

paidBudget.description: Incremental-cash budget: explicitly unlimited or a finite non-negative USD cap.

spendUsd.description: Spend so far in USD; null when unknown.

remainingUsd.description: Remaining budget in USD; null when no cap or unknown spend.

estimated.description: True when spend is token-derived rather than natively reported.

source.description: Where the snapshot came from: the decision record, live events, settings, or unknown.

budget.description: Budget snapshot for a run: cap, spend, and provenance.

finalSummary.description: Final summary text; null when the run has none.

winner.description: Winning attempt/candidate id; null when nothing won.

status.description: Terminal status of a run, including truthful blocked, interrupted-unknown, cost-unverifiable, overshoot, exhaustion, non-convergence, failure, and cancellation outcomes.

outcome.description: Arbitration outcome for the winning candidate: ready (verified applyable), no_op (no changes), ungated (no gates configured), review_not_run, or blocked.

why_not_others.description: Per-candidate reasons the others lost, keyed by candidate id.

accepted_risks.description: Risks explicitly accepted in the decision.

final_checks.description: Final checks performed before the decision.

evidence_facts.description: Evidence facts the decision rests on.

spend_usd.description: Total settled spend in USD; null when unknown.

estimated.description: True when any of the spend is token-derived rather than natively reported.

budget_summary.description: Settled spend for the run; estimates are disclosed, never presented as exact.

apply_recommendation.description: Recommended next action for the run's work product: apply it, inspect first, continue working, split the task, or get human review.

verification_basis.description: What backed an applyable outcome: none (non-applyable), cross_family_review (a clean cross-family verified review), or both (deterministic gates and that review).

attempted.description: Whether the final verify was attempted.

base_sha.description: Base SHA the verify tree was created from (the winner envelope's base).

applied_cleanly.description: Whether the patch applied cleanly onto the fresh tree; null when not attempted.

gates_passed.description: Whether the re-run deterministic gates passed; null when not attempted.

duration_ms.description: How long the verify took, in milliseconds.

reason.description: Typed reason when attempted=false (e.g. no_patch, no_base_sha) or a failure detail.

anyOf.description: FinalVerifier record: the winner's patch was applied onto a fresh worktree at the candidate's own base SHA and the deterministic gates were re-run there; no model involvement.

final_verify.description: Final verify record; present only for write runs with a patch (or a recorded reason why the verifier did not run).

anyOf.description: The arbitration decision for a run: winner, status/outcome, reasons, spend, and the verification that backs applyability.

decision.description: The arbitration decision; null before arbitration.

operatorDecision.description: Persisted operator unblock decision (accept_risk/override), hash-bound; null when none was made.

kind.description: Kind of work product a run produces: a patch against the base tree, a newly created repository, or a report document.

source_task_id.description: Task the work product came from.

producer_attempt_id.description: Attempt that produced it, when known.

files.description: Kind-specific file payload, e.g. artifact name to path (validated loosely here; specialized per kind by callers).

anyOf.description: The deliverable a run produced (patch, new repo, or report), referenced by apply/delivery verbs.

workProduct.description: The run's work product; null when none was produced.

eligible.description: True when the apply gate would accept this run's patch right now.

state.description: The gate's state classification (e.g. blocked | ungated | review_not_run | no_op | ok) when known.

reason.description: The gate's refusal text when not eligible (null when eligible).

requiredAction.description: Honest guidance for what actually unblocks apply (typed operator decision, add gates, re-run, or nothing to apply).

anyOf.description: Derived apply-gate verdict for a run's WorkProduct (single producer in the delivery gate).

applyEligibility.description: Derived apply-gate verdict (single producer: the delivery gate); null when the run has no patch artifact.

severity.description: Reviewer-assigned severity of a finding: BLOCK and FIX_FIRST can block convergence when accepted with evidence, WARN/NIT are advisory, OUT_OF_SCOPE and INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE are triage verdicts, NEEDS_HUMAN escalates to a human decision.

category.description: Subject-matter category of a review finding.

linked_acceptance_criteria.description: Ids of acceptance criteria this finding relates to.

lines.description: Line range in the file (e.g. "10-42"); null when the whole file is cited.

command.description: Command whose output supports the finding.

commands.description: Commands whose output supports the finding.

evidence.description: Evidence backing a finding; a finding without evidence cannot block.

proposed_fix.description: Reviewer-proposed fix; null when none was offered.

requested_model.description: Model requested for the reviewer route.

requested_effort.description: Reasoning effort requested for the reviewer route.

observed_model.description: Model the harness actually reported using.

route_proof_status.description: How strongly the executed route is proven: verified (observed evidence matches the request), accepted_model_arg (the requested model arg was accepted without stream evidence), unverified, or same_model_fallback (a fallback landed on the same model).

reviewer.description: Who reviewed: the harness/model route and its verification status.

status.description: Lifecycle status of a finding, from proposed through accepted/rebutted/fixed to terminal triage states (accepted_risk, duplicate, stale, out_of_scope, insufficient_evidence).

revalidation_note.description: Note recorded when the finding was revalidated against a changed tree.

items.description: One evidence-backed review finding produced by a reviewer harness.

reviewFindings.description: Review findings recorded for the run.

attemptId.description: Attempt the interaction was raised in, when known.

sourceTool.description: Native tool that raised the request.

header.description: Short chip/header text some harnesses attach to a question.

label.description: Option label shown to the user.

description.description: Optional longer explanation of the option.

items.description: One multiple-choice option of an interactive question.

options.description: Selectable options; empty for free-text-only questions.

multi_select.description: Whether multiple options may be selected.

items.description: One question of an interactive user-input request.

timeoutAt.description: When the interaction times out into a benign decline; null = no timeout.

items.description: A live interactive question awaiting the user's answer (snapshot projection).

index.description: Position of the step in the plan.

tool.description: Tool in the orchestrate planner's belt, mapping 1:1 onto engine entry points: start_run, race (best-of-N), status, answer_question, apply, and review.

risk.description: Risk class of the step: safe (no live-tree mutation) or risky.

status.description: Executor status of one plan step: pending, running, done, skipped, blocked (risky step awaiting a human), or failed.

terminal_status.description: Actual child/delivery terminal used by the parent outcome reducer.

evidence_refs.description: Immutable run artifact or delivery receipt references.

run_id.description: Sub-run id this step started/targeted, when known.

autonomy.description: How much the orchestrate planner may act without confirmation: suggest (user executes the plan), auto_safe (auto-runs only provably safe steps), auto_full (auto-runs everything).

stopped_reason.description: Set when the executor stopped early (first risky step under auto_safe, budget, abort).

anyOf.description: Typed executor progress over a plan's tool calls, persisted as final/orchestration_progress.yaml and projected into run detail.

orchestrate.description: Typed executor progress for an orchestrate run; null for non-orchestrate runs or suggest autonomy.

costUsd.description: Spend attributed to the candidate, in USD.

costEstimated.description: True when the cost is token-derived rather than natively reported.

errored.description: True when the candidate's attempt errored.

gatesPassed.description: Number of deterministic gates that passed.

gatesTotal.description: Total deterministic gates run for the candidate.

blockers.description: Count of accepted blocking review findings.

reviewVerified.description: Whether the candidate's review route was verified.

finalReviewClean.description: Whether the final review was clean; null when no final review ran.

diffstat.description: Diff statistics of the candidate's patch; null when there is no patch.

items.description: Per-candidate evidence card for a race run, projected from attempt, review, and decision artifacts.

candidates.description: Per-candidate evidence cards for every envelope-producing mode; empty only when no attempt artifacts exist.

planProgress.description: Live plan checklist from the last plan.progress event; null when the run never emitted one.

failure.description: Typed failure info; null unless the run failed.

ControlRunDetail.description: Full run detail snapshot served by GET /runs/:id: summary, artifacts, timeline, decision, findings, and progress.
